productDisplayName: Puma Men Foundation Quarters White Socks
description: One pair of warm ankle length socks in whiteMade of 70% cotton, 29% nylon and 1% elastaneRib at opening to grip above ankleThree dimensional shaped heel and toe for best FitTerry-towelling inner at sole for extreme comfort and paddingWear these super comfy socks to keep your feet cosy.  puma ensure that all their products are designed to offer the best performance and these socks are no exception.Sock careMachine wash in warm waterDo not iron, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean
